title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nocil - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nocil - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Nocil in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!
